message:
style(test): align formatting across 27 proptest generator files

Apply consistent formatting to all proptest_*.rs and
egress_tap_integration.rs files:
- Align multi-line strategy expressions and match arms
- Normalize comment indentation within prop_compose! blocks
- Wrap long assertion messages for readability
- Consistent spacing around closure parameters

No functional changes - purely whitespace/alignment adjustments
to improve readability of the property-based test suite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
